name: PVR Kotak Gold Credit Card
exclusions: movie ticket benefits depend on monthly spend thresholds and claim flow
benefits are entertainment-focused rather than reward-rate focused
milestoneBenefits: Get 1 free PVR ticket every month on spends of Rs 10,000, each ticket up to Rs 400
Get 2 free PVR tickets every month on spends of Rs 15,000, each ticket up to Rs 400
additionalBenefits: 15% cashback on food and beverages at PVR

salaried: Eligibility is subject to Kotak Mahindra Bank approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to Kotak Mahindra Bank approval criteria
